chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-5919 of 2024 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________________ Fresh Case: 1. For order on Misc. No.26276/2024 (Urgent/App) 2. For order on Misc. No.26277/2024 (Exemption/App) 3. For order on Misc. No.26278/2024 (Stay/App) 4. For hearing of main case. [Statement filed regarding Constitutional Bench] ---- 25.11.2024 Petitioner No.2 present in person. ----- 1. Urgency application is granted. 2-4. The petitioners, claiming to be students of the First-Year BA-LLB Program at Government Islamia College, Karachi, have filed this petition with multiple prayers, including the supply of water, electricity, and qualified teaching staff. It is the case of the petitioners that Karachi University has announced the schedule of examinations commencing from 23.12.2024, but they could not prepare for the subjects, i.e., English, Urdu, Natural Science, and Political Science; hence, they seek postponement of the examinations for these subjects. It appears that the petitioners got admission to the aforesaid College in December 2023. Now, after the passing of an entire year and the announcement of the examination schedule, they have approached this Court with the aforementioned grievances. Simply on the wishes of two students who could not prepare for the subjects, the examinations of thousands of other students cannot be postponed. The petitioners have failed to assert any fundamental right; hence, this petition, being devoid of merit, is dismissed in limine along with the listed applications.

The petitioners have failed to assert any fundamental right; hence, this petition, being devoid of merit, is dismissed in limine along with the listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Tahseen
